what_it_does: A preamble block for the dragnet-development channel that provides session context, project history, working rules, and the intended use of a block-addressable, commentable design artifact.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id item-a49f74ee, board:// address, type block, source claude_code, state current, title B0 Preamble, author_session ch-3mpkjg3r, channel dragnet-development, and a part_of link to board://item-389c8489.
The body explains the Company fabric setup: isolated Claude Code sessions coordinating over a disk-backed store under ~/company, with Tim as a non-developer CEO who only sees user messages.
It lists seven milestones of the session: connector hardening, wind-down/harvest, image/attachment layer, the dragnet, overnight evidence passes, ChatGPT replay diagnosis, and the dragnet deep-dive.

It states explicit working rules: never summarize, expand maximally, think for Tim, default to act on reversible/technical items, friction-is-the-gap-sensor, evidence over assertion, and default-to-wrong on own claims.
It frames the document as a multi-purpose artifact: design record, comment surface for Tim, and capability-gap discovery exercise.
It notes that five background agents were dispatched on loose themes and that this preamble precedes a verbatim lead response broken into addressable blocks.
Timestamps are ISO 8601 with timezone; history shows a single filed transition from null to current.
standouts: The explicit anti-summary rule: 'Never summarize; expand maximally; volume is a feature.'
The detailed self-correction narrative about mislabeling ChatGPT as amnesiac when the logs showed a delivery-layer replay.
The deliberate use of the artifact itself to stress-test and expose missing tooling capabilities.
The five-agent thematic background research designed to surface unknowns rather than confirm lead biases.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, type, source, state, title, author_session, channel, links, timestamps, and history.
Uses board:// URI addressing and a channel-memory noticeboard path.
Uses Markdown headings and bullet lists for narrative structure.
Uses a B0 numbering prefix in the title to indicate ordering within a thread.
Uses ISO 8601 timestamps with explicit timezone offsets.
Declares a part_of relationship to a parent board item.
concerns: The text refers to 'the blocks below' and a verbatim lead response, but this file contains only the preamble; the actual blocks are not present here, so the file is not self-contained.
References to the five agent outputs and the verbatim response are narrative rather than linked/addressed, so navigation depends on external knowledge.
The heavy narrative density may make it harder for future sessions to extract specific facts without additional indexing.
notes: A session-level preamble that sets the frame, working rules, and intended block-commenting workflow for the dragnet deep-dive design artifact.
questions: Where are the verbatim response blocks and the five agent outputs referenced in the text?
How are comments actually attached to specific blocks in the current tooling?
What does board://item-a49f74ee resolve to in the on-disk store?
Is the 'multiple-birds' comment-and-build workflow already implemented or still aspirational?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to provide full context and a reading frame for the document; the content does that, but it also acts as a manifesto and project history, and the promised response blocks are not included in this file.
apparent_themes: Multi-agent background research to counter bias
intention_signals: It is trying to create a durable, navigable context layer so Tim and future sessions can understand the deep-dive's origin and rules, while also using the act of building the document to reveal what tooling still needs to exist.
novelty: It combines a preamble-as-ledger-entry, explicit working-rules-as-content, a public self-correction narrative, and a deliberate build-to-discover-gaps intent within a channel-memory artifact.
contribution: It contributes a human-readable session context and operating frame for a channel-attached design artifact, capturing project history, rules, and intent in a discoverable, addressable block so future orientation does not have to be reconstructed.
summary_for_embedding: Preamble block for the dragnet-development channel that records the session frame, project history, working rules, and intended block-commenting workflow for a deep-dive design artifact.
intention_for_embedding: To give Tim and future sessions the full background and reading rules needed to comment on and continue the dragnet deep-dive.
